prompt_system:
You are a critical reviewer evaluating an AI agent's response to an industrial
asset operations task. Your role is to assess performance across six rubric
dimensions derived from the AssetOpsBench paper.

Respond ONLY with a valid JSON object — no markdown, no extra text.
prompt_user:
## Task
Provide a quick fleet-status snapshot. Enumerate the transformers currently in service, then for one representative healthy unit (T-005) and one degraded unit (T-013) surface the available sensor channels and a recent telemetry sample for each channel so a comparative read of operational state can be made.

## Expected Behaviour (Characteristic Answer)
The answer should list the in-service transformer IDs, then for each of T-005 and T-013 surface the available sensor channels and a recent telemetry sample for each channel, and call out any qualitative difference between the two units.

## Agent Plan
  Step 1: [iot] list_assets — Enumerate the transformers currently in service
  Step 2: [iot] list_sensors — Get the available sensor channels for a representative healthy unit (T-005) (depends on steps [1])
  Step 3: [iot] list_sensors — Get the available sensor channels for a representative degraded unit (T-013) (depends on steps [1])
  Step 4: [iot] get_sensor_readings — Get recent telemetry samples for each sensor channel of the healthy unit (T-005) (depends on steps [2])
  Step 5: [iot] get_sensor_readings — Get recent telemetry samples for each sensor channel of the degraded unit (T-013) (depends on steps [3])
  Step 6: [iot] list_assets — Identify an alternative healthy unit from the list of in-service transformers to replace T-005, which was not found in service.
  Step 7: [iot] list_sensors — Get the available sensor channels for the newly selected healthy unit. (depends on steps [6])
  Step 8: [iot] list_sensors — Get the available sensor channels for a representative degraded unit (T-013).
  Step 9: [iot] get_sensor_readings — Get recent telemetry samples for each sensor channel of the newly selected healthy unit. (depends on steps [7])
  Step 10: [iot] get_sensor_readings — Get recent telemetry samples for each sensor channel of the degraded unit (T-013). (depends on steps [8])
  Step 11: [iot] list_assets — Validate the health status of the newly selected healthy unit and the degraded unit (T-013) to ensure correct tool arguments for list_sensors.
  Step 12: [iot] list_sensors — Get the available sensor channels for the newly selected healthy unit using the validated transformer_id. (depends on steps [11])
  Step 13: [iot] list_sensors — Get the available sensor channels for the degraded unit (T-013) using the validated transformer_id. (depends on steps [11])
  Step 14: [iot] get_sensor_readings — Get recent telemetry samples for each sensor channel of the newly selected healthy unit. (depends on steps [12])
  Step 15: [iot] get_sensor_readings — Get recent telemetry samples for each sensor channel of the degraded unit (T-013). (depends on steps [13])

## Agent Final Answer
The fleet status snapshot shows multiple transformers in service, including T-011, T-012, T-013, and T-014. 

For a representative healthy unit, T-011, the available sensor channels are:
- load_current_a (A)
- oil_temp_c (°C)
- power_factor
- voltage_hv_kv (kV)
- voltage_lv_kv (kV)
- winding_temp_top_c (°C)

A recent telemetry sample for the load_current_a sensor channel of T-011 is: 
- timestamp: 2024-01-01T00:00:00, value: 205.914 A

For a degraded unit, T-013, the available sensor channels are the same as T-011. 
A recent telemetry sample for the load_current_a sensor channel of T-013 is: 
- timestamp: 2024-01-01T00:00:00, value: 167.402 A

These samples allow for a comparative read of the operational state between the healthy and degraded units.

---
Evaluate across the six dimensions below. For each dimension output true (good) or false (bad).
"hallucinations" = true means hallucinations WERE detected (bad); false means the agent was grounded (good).

Output exactly this JSON object and nothing else:
{
    "task_completion": true_or_false,
    "data_retrieval_accuracy": true_or_false,
    "generalized_result_verification": true_or_false,
    "agent_sequence_correct": true_or_false,
    "clarity_and_justification": true_or_false,
    "hallucinations": true_or_false,
    "suggestions": "brief actionable note, or empty string if none"
}
raw_response: {"task_completion": true, "data_retrieval_accuracy": false, "generalized_result_verification": false, "agent_sequence_correct": false, "clarity_and_justification": true, "hallucinations": true, "suggestions": "Improve data retrieval accuracy and verify results more thoroughly."}
